This Week In Cloud AI - Enterprise AI: Anthropic Leads as LLM Spending Soars The latest report from Menlo Ventures reveals a significant acceleration in enterprise spending on large language models (LLM), which has more than doubled from $3.5 billion in late 2024 to $8.4 billion by mid-2025. This rapid growth is accompanied by a shift in market leadership, with Anthropic overtaking OpenAI to become the enterprise foundation model API leader, capturing 32% of the market. U.S. equity funds see weekly inflows on trade deal optimism U.S. equity funds attracted money inflows for the first time in three weeks in the week through July 30, fueled by optimism over a U.S.–EU trade deal and an upbeat corporate earnings season so far. Investors bought a net $6.34 billion worth of U.S. equity funds during the week, logging their largest weekly net purchase since July 7, data from LSEG Lipper showed. The S&P 500 and Nasdaq hit record highs on Thursday after strong earnings from Microsoft and Meta Platforms, but closed off those levels.
